===''Pokémon the Series''===
[[File:Caitlin anime.png|thumb|250px|Caitlin in {{aniseries|BW}}]]
====''Pokémon the Series: Black & White''====
Caitlin debuted in ''[[BW090|Jostling for the Junior Cup!]]'', where she participated in an {{wp|exhibition game|exhibition match}} against {{an|Cynthia}} in the [[Pokémon World Tournament Junior Cup]]. Despite how powerful the two Trainers were, the time limit put on the battle ended before either of their Pokémon could be defeated, making the match a draw.

She briefly reappeared in ''[[BW093|Goodbye, Junior Cup - Hello Adventure!]]'', where she was part of the Junior Cup's closing ceremony.

====Character====
Caitlin aims to battle with grace and elegance. Though she looks confident on the outside, it is implied she is still struggling to become an [[Elite Four]] member by her close friend and mentor {{an|Cynthia}}, as seen during the {{wp|exhibition game|exhibition match}} in ''[[BW090|Jostling for the Junior Cup!]]''.
